{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD subgraph DataMapper["Retold Data Mapper process"] Orator["Orator HTTP server
(restify)"] WebUI["Static web UI
(orator-static-server)"] REST["REST API /mapper/*
(ConnectionBridge)"] SQLite["Internal SQLite
(MappingConfig, OperationTemplate)"] Beacon["Ultravisor beacon
(ultravisor-beacon)"] Client["Mesh dispatch client
(fable-ultravisor-client)"] end Browser["Browser / API client"] --> Orator Orator --> WebUI Orator --> REST REST --> SQLite REST --> Client UV["Ultravisor"] Beacon -- "registers capabilities" --> UV Client -- "POST /Operation + /Trigger" --> UV UV -- "dispatches DataMapper capability work items" --> Beacon SourceBeacon["Source databeacon"] TargetBeacon["Target databeacon"] UV -- "DataBeaconAccess / MeadowProxy" --> SourceBeacon UV -- "MeadowProxy Upserts" --> TargetBeacon ","style":"notebook"}
